atten4.ptxt: When installing the spoiler, heat the vehicle body and spoiler using a heat light.

atten3.ptxt: Do not heat the vehicle body and rear spoiler excessively.

s3.ptxt: Using a heat light, heat the vehicle body surface.
Remove the double-sided tape from the vehicle body.
Wipe off any tape adhesive residue with cleaner.

s2.ptxt: Clean the rear spoiler. (If reusing the rear spoiler)

s3.ptxt: Using a heat light, heat the rear spoiler.
Remove the double-sided tape from the rear spoiler.
Wipe off any tape adhesive residue with cleaner.
Apply new double-sided tape to the rear spoiler.
Using a heat light, heat the vehicle body and rear spoiler.
Remove the release paper from the rear spoiler.

atten4.ptxt: After removing the release paper, keep the exposed adhesive free from foreign matter.

s3.ptxt: Engage the 4 clips and install the rear spoiler with the 2 nuts.

s2.ptxt: Install the luggage compartment door cover with the 13 clips.
